name: Glade Chairlift Soap Update
description: Advance lift time and swap scenes
code: (function(){state.t=(state.t||0)+1;var t=state.t||0;var chairs=state.chairs||[];for(var i=0;i<chairs.length;i++){var ch=chairs[i];ch.u=(ch.u+0.0008)%1; if(t%600===0){ch.scene=(ch.scene+1)%4;} ch.phase+=0.03;}state.chairs=chairs;return state;})();
